scenario: Partial delivery — shipment was for 2000 kg, first BOL delivered 1200 kg, this bill covers remaining 800 kg on a second truck. Agent must trace prior freight bills.
Rate drift — billed rate (₹8.70/kg) is ~8.75% above the contracted rate (₹8.00/kg). Small enough to miss, large enough to matter. Should flag.
